title: jelly hunger bar
description:
This texture pack will make your hunger bar look like jelly!
A fun and wavy twist to your Minecraft HUD, made by JellyFrost.
body:
This texture pack will make your hunger bar look like jelly!
Add a soft, squishy vibe to your survival experience with a cute and colorful jelly-themed hunger bar — designed by JellyFrost.

![How does it look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a870ff0197f65113ada7c5536eb87d2f582a0a23.png)
